ques: Find a beginner level Coursera course related to "Internet of Things (IoT)" with a high rating. Provide the course name, instructor's name, and a brief summary of the skills that will be taught.
answer: Course: "IoT (Internet of Things) Wireless & Cloud Computing Emerging Technologies" (Yonsei University), Beginner level, rated 4.7/5 from 1,447 reviews. Instructor: Jong-Moon Chung. Skills taught: a foundational, hands-on intro covering IoT business & products, IoT architecture & technologies, IoT networks, Wi-Fi & Bluetooth wireless communication, and cloud technology (incl. AWS EC2 cloud projects) — building skills in Internet of Things, cloud computing & cloud platforms, cloud computing architecture, wireless/local-area networks, networking protocols/infrastructure, and cloud-based integration.
